package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for tests_assert_raw_json_strings_without_response_dto: Brittle raw-JSON string assertions when typed response DTOs exist.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule202NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule202NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule202NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario202Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule202NegativeService, input Rule202NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
